name: Uniti Group Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Uniti Group Inc. (herein referred to as the Company, Uniti, we, us, or our) was incorporated in the State of Delaware on April 19, 2024, under the name Windstream Parent, Inc and as a subsidiary of New Windstream, LLC (Windstream) (as successor to Windstream Holdings II, LLC) in connection with the Merger (as defined below).
